title: Virgo August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Virgo August 2026 horoscope: Solar eclipse New Moon in Leo (Aug 12, 12th house) + Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon (Aug 28, 7th house). Eclipse season works behind the scenes and then in partnership. Crystal: Carnelian.
rank_math_title: Virgo August 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Virgo August 2026 monthly horoscope — eclipse season, key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Carnelian). Solar eclipse Aug 12 in Leo (rest); Pisces lunar eclipse Aug 28 (partnership).
content:
Virgo August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRest the unseen, then commit to the partnership
Key DatesSolar eclipse New Moon Aug 12 (Leo, 12th house) / Sun into Virgo Aug 23 (your season begins) / Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon Aug 28 (7th house)
Love12th house eclipse surrenders a hidden pattern; the 7th house lunar eclipse brings partnership to climax
CareerQuiet work early; collaborative contracts peak late
Crystal of the MonthCarnelian
Lucky ColorsWarm terracotta, soft sage, deep navy
Lucky Number7
AffirmationI rest the unseen weight; I meet the other with both hands free.

This Month's Energy

Virgo, August 2026 is eclipse season, and the eclipses work the two ends of your relational sky. The New Moon in Leo on August 12 is a solar eclipse, falling in your 12th house of rest, retreat, the unconscious, and closure — a quiet release of a hidden pattern, a private ending, an old fear. Then August 28 brings a lunar eclipse Full Moon in Pisces, falling in your 7th house of partnership and contracts — a climax around a relationship, a marriage, a business partnership, or a contract. August's pattern is: release the hidden weight early, then meet the other with both hands free.

Key Dates for Virgo in August 2026

DateTransitMeaning for VirgoDo / Avoid
Aug 12New Moon in Leo — Solar Eclipse12th house — quiet release, rest, retreat, closure of an old pattern; eclipse amplifies surrender of a hidden weightDo: rest, journal on what's ending, name the secret you're releasing
Avoid: starting anything new; let the chapter close
Aug 23Sun enters Virgo1st house season — your birthday season begins; identity, vitality, personal direction through late SeptemberDo: declare the next personal chapter, change the look, take the new role
Avoid: postponing your own renewal to serve others
Aug 28Full Moon in Pisces — Lunar Eclipse7th house — partnership, marriage, contracts climax; a long-building relationship, contract, or collaboration reaches a turning pointDo: commit, sign the contract, marry, name the partnership
Avoid: hiding from a partnership decision that has been building for months
Aug 11Venus enters Virgo (your 1st)Warmth toward self, body, personal identity through September — you become magneticDo: invest in your body, your image, your self-worth
Avoid: shrinking to keep others comfortable
Aug 19Mars enters Sagittarius4th house — home, family, inner foundation become action zones through OctoberDo: move, renovate, settle the family decision
Avoid: family conflicts fueled by post-eclipse fatigue
Aug 30Mercury enters Libra (your 2nd)Your ruler moves to the money-and-worth house — income conversations move forwardDo: set the rate, sign the income contract, organize money
Avoid: undervaluing your work in the new chapter

Career & Money

For Virgo, August's career story is backloaded. The first three weeks emphasize the 12th house solar eclipse (August 12) — a quieter, behind-the-scenes phase where rest, completion, and closure matter more than launches. Use this window to finish old projects and clear the back end.

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 7th house of partnership and contracts — a climax around a long-building collaboration, a business partnership, a contract, or a marriage. Combined with your birthday season beginning August 23 and Venus entering your 1st house on August 11, the second half strongly favors partnership-led visibility. Mercury (your ruler) entering Libra (your 2nd house of income) on August 30 sets up a money conversation that runs through September. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is rest the back end early, then commit to the partnership late.

Love & Relationships

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — for Virgo, this is the love signature of 2026. A long-building relationship decision, contract, marriage, or partnership reaches a turning point. Eclipse full moons in the 7th house mark major relationship chapters.

The 12th house solar eclipse on August 12 asks you to release a hidden relational pattern first — an old attachment, a private grief, an unconscious dynamic. Then Venus enters your 1st house on August 11, making you magnetic through September. The order matters: clear the hidden weight, then meet the other with both hands free. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is finishing the inner chapter so the partnership can land cleanly.

Health & Wellness

Eclipse seasons fatigue the body, and the 12th house solar eclipse on August 12 is the most rest-demanding transit for Virgo in 2026. The 12th house rules the unconscious, sleep, and hidden stress — for several days around August 12, treat rest as the assignment.

After your birthday season begins August 23 (your 1st house), vitality returns. Carnelian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with vitality, courage, and grounded motivation — a useful symbolic companion for the transition from rest (12th house) to renewal (1st house). Mercury-ruled Virgo carries tension in the gut and nervous system; gentle digestion-friendly routines and screen-free mornings are especially helpful now. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Carnelian

Why Carnelian fits Virgo this month. You are Mercury-ruled and August's eclipses bookend your sky: 12th house surrender (August 12) into 1st house renewal (your birthday season) into 7th house partnership (August 28). Carnelian — traditionally tied to vitality, courage, and grounded action — is the stone that moves Virgo from rest to renewal without skipping the inner work. Where Clear Quartz would be too cool and Amethyst would deepen the rest further, Carnelian warms the earthy Virgo nature back into motion. The earth-sign steadiness meets a stone that lifts it.

How to use it during August 2026. Place Carnelian on your nightstand on August 12 (the 12th house eclipse) — let it warm the dreams. Carry it in your pocket from August 23 onward (your birthday season and the run-up to the 7th house lunar eclipse).

Best date to use it: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 7th house — hold Carnelian at your sacral area for 5 minutes before any partnership conversation that day.

Read more: Carnelian Meaning and Best Crystals for Virgo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Virgo — August 2026

When: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 7th house.
Crystal: Carnelian.
Intention: Release the hidden weight; meet the partnership with both hands free.

  1. Cleanse Carnelian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of August 12 (the 12th house eclipse). Let it sit on your nightstand through the 12th.
  2. Set the intention between the two eclipses (August 12–28): write down one hidden relational pattern you're ready to release — and the partnership decision you'll make once it's cleared.
  3. Act at the 7th house lunar eclipse on August 28: have the partnership conversation, sign the contract, commit. Carnelian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your 1st house): how has the new personal chapter begun now that the partnership has landed and the hidden weight is gone? Hold Carnelian during the review.

Shop Virgo Crystals for August 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Virgo crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, focus, vitality, and partnership — including the Carnelian that warms Virgo from rest into renewal during an eclipse-heavy birthday season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Virgo August 2026

Is August 2026 a good month for Virgo?

It's a rest-and-partnership month. The Leo solar eclipse on August 12 (your 12th house of rest) closes a hidden chapter. Your birthday season begins August 23. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 (your 7th house) is one of 2026's biggest partnership moments.

How will the solar eclipse on August 12 affect Virgo?

It falls in your 12th house of rest, retreat, and the unconscious — a quiet release of a hidden pattern or private ending. Treat the days around it as a rest assignment, not a launch window.

What does the Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 mean for Virgo?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts — a long-building relationship or collaboration reaches a turning point. Commit; sign; say yes.

What is the best crystal for Virgo in August 2026?

Carnelian — it warms the earthy Virgo nature from rest into renewal, exactly what a 12th house eclipse plus a 7th house lunar eclipse plus birthday season demand. See the full Virgo crystal guide →

Why does Virgo's birthday season begin with a 12th house eclipse?

The 12th house solar eclipse on August 12 falls just before your season begins August 23 — the symbolic order is: close the old hidden chapter first (12th), then begin the new personal year (1st). The rest is the assignment, not a delay.
